questionHtml: State the null and alternative hypotheses for this test.
markschemeHtml:
H0: the size of peppers is independent of colour

H1: the size of peppers is not independent of colour          A1

 

Note: Award A1 for both hypotheses correct. Accept “not associated” in place of independent. Do not accept “correlated” or “related” or “affected”.

[1 mark]

meta.title: State the null and alternative hypotheses for this test.
